evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-1: High-Intensity Statin Missing in PAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-1

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-2: ABI Screening Not Done
gapsPushIds: ABI screening not performed
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-2

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-003: Abnormal ABI (<=0.90) without a coded PAD diagnosis -> undiagnosed PAD (AUDIT-179 foundational build)
gapsPushIds: Abnormal ABI (<=0.90) without a coded PAD diagnosis: undiagnosed peripheral artery disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-003

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-3: Antiplatelet in PAD
gapsPushIds: Antiplatelet therapy missing in PAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-3

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-4: Smoking Cessation in PAD
gapsPushIds: Smoking cessation referral recommended for review in PAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-4

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-5: Exercise Therapy for Claudication
gapsPushIds: Supervised exercise therapy recommended for review in PAD with claudication
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-5

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-6: Diabetes Control in PAD - HbA1c above target (PV-015)
gapsPushIds: HbA1c above target (>=7.0%) in PAD with diabetes: glycemic optimization gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-6

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-7: Wound Care Assessment
gapsPushIds: Wound care assessment referral recommended for review in PAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-7

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-8: Duplex Ultrasound Follow-up
gapsPushIds: Duplex ultrasound follow-up recommended for review post-intervention
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-8

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-9: AAA Screening
gapsPushIds: Abdominal aortic aneurysm screening recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-9

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-10: Cilostazol for Claudication
gapsPushIds: Cilostazol not prescribed for claudication in PAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-10

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-11: ACEi/ARB in PAD with Hypertension
gapsPushIds: ACEi/ARB not prescribed in PAD with hypertension
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-11

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-12: Renal Artery Stenosis Screen in RESISTANT HTN + renal impairment (PV-033)
gapsPushIds: Renal artery stenosis screening recommended for review in PAD with HTN and renal impairment
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-12

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-13: Carotid Screening in PAD
gapsPushIds: Carotid screening recommended for review in PAD with stroke risk factors
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-13

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-14: Annual Foot Exam in PAD with Diabetes
gapsPushIds: Annual comprehensive foot exam recommended for review in PAD with diabetes
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-14

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-15: Compression Therapy Assessment
gapsPushIds: Compression therapy assessment recommended for review in venous disease with edema
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-15

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-RIVAROXABAN: Low-Dose Rivaroxaban in PAD (COMPASS Trial)
gapsPushIds: Consider low-dose rivaroxaban + aspirin per COMPASS trial for PAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-RIVAROXABAN

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-CLOPIDOGREL: Clopidogrel for Aspirin Intolerance in PAD
gapsPushIds: Consider clopidogrel as alternative antiplatelet for PAD with aspirin intolerance
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-CLOPIDOGREL

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-BYPASS-EVAL: Bypass Surgery Evaluation for CLI
gapsPushIds: Consider surgical bypass evaluation for chronic limb-threatening ischemia
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-BYPASS-EVAL

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-ENDOVASCULAR: Endovascular Evaluation for Lifestyle-Limiting Claudication
gapsPushIds: Consider endovascular intervention evaluation for lifestyle-limiting claudication
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-ENDOVASCULAR

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-VENOUS-ULCER: Venous Ulcer Management
gapsPushIds: Consider comprehensive venous ulcer management protocol
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-VENOUS-ULCER

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-DVT-SCREEN: DVT Screening for Unilateral Edema
gapsPushIds: Consider DVT screening for unilateral edema
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-DVT-SCREEN

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-PTS-PREVENTION: Post-Thrombotic Syndrome Prevention after DVT
gapsPushIds: Consider compression therapy for post-thrombotic syndrome prevention after DVT
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-PTS-PREVENTION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-MESENTERIC: Mesenteric Ischemia Screening in PAD
gapsPushIds: Consider mesenteric ischemia evaluation in PAD patient with intestinal vascular symptoms
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-MESENTERIC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-THORACIC-OUTLET: Thoracic Outlet Syndrome Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider thoracic outlet syndrome evaluation for young patient with upper extremity vascular symptoms
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-THORACIC-OUTLET

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-VARICOSE: Symptomatic / complicated varicose vein management (PV-071)
gapsPushIds: Consider venous insufficiency evaluation and management for symptomatic varicose veins
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-VARICOSE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-LYMPHEDEMA: Lymphedema Management
gapsPushIds: Consider comprehensive decongestive therapy referral for lymphedema
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-LYMPHEDEMA

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-RAYNAUD: Calcium Channel Blocker for Raynaud Phenomenon
gapsPushIds: Consider calcium channel blocker for Raynaud phenomenon
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-RAYNAUD

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-VASCULAR-REHAB: Vascular Rehabilitation Post-Intervention
gapsPushIds: Consider supervised exercise rehabilitation post vascular intervention
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-VASCULAR-REHAB

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-PENTOXIFYLLINE: Pentoxifylline When Cilostazol Contraindicated
gapsPushIds: Consider pentoxifylline for claudication in PAD patient with HF (cilostazol contraindicated)
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-PENTOXIFYLLINE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-NAFTIDROFURYL: Naftidrofuryl for Severe Claudication
gapsPushIds: Consider naftidrofuryl for severe claudication per ESC/ESVS Guideline
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-NAFTIDROFURYL

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-CRITICAL-LIMB: Critical Limb Ischemia Urgent Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider urgent vascular evaluation for critical limb ischemia with tissue loss
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-CRITICAL-LIMB

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-GRAFT-SURVEILLANCE: Bypass Graft Surveillance (PV-098)
gapsPushIds: Consider interval duplex surveillance for peripheral bypass graft
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-GRAFT-SURVEILLANCE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // PV-ANTICOAG-VTE: VTE Anticoagulation Duration Review (PV-076)
gapsPushIds: Consider VTE anticoagulation duration review and continued need assessment
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-ANTICOAG-VTE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-004: Non-compressible ABI (>1.40) without toe-brachial confirmation - the calcified-vessel companion to PV-003
gapsPushIds: Non-compressible ABI (>1.40): toe-brachial index recommended for perfusion assessment
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-004

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-034: Fibromuscular dysplasia (FMD) screening in a young hypertensive woman without an FMD diagnosis
gapsPushIds: Consider fibromuscular dysplasia screening in young woman with early-onset hypertension
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-034

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-038: Takayasu arteritis without immunosuppression on the active medication list
gapsPushIds: Takayasu arteritis without immunosuppressive therapy: disease-control gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-038

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-040: Giant cell arteritis without glucocorticoid - urgent steroid (vision-threatening emergency)
gapsPushIds: Giant cell arteritis without glucocorticoid therapy: vision-threatening treatment gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-040

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-041: Buerger disease (thromboangiitis obliterans) with continued tobacco use - cessation IS the treatment
gapsPushIds: Buerger disease with continued tobacco use: complete cessation is disease-modifying
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-041

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-058: Symptomatic carotid stenosis (recent stroke/TIA + carotid stenosis) - urgent revascularization evaluation
gapsPushIds: Symptomatic carotid stenosis: urgent revascularization evaluation recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-058

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap PV-062: Symptomatic intracranial atherosclerotic stenosis without aggressive medical therapy (SAMMPRIS)
gapsPushIds: Symptomatic intracranial stenosis without aggressive medical therapy (antiplatelet + statin)
evaluatorBlocks.name: PV-062
